data.name: Risk Assessment exercise completed annually
data.description: This test checks that a snapshot of your risk register was taken within the past year and that it is available to auditors.
data.failureDescription: No snapshots of your risk register from the past year have been shared with auditors.
data.remediationDescription:
Review your risks at least annually. During each review, delete risks that are no longer relevant to your business and record any new risks that may impact your company over the coming year.

Review your [risk register](/risk-management/risk-register) and update or complete the treatment plans for all approved risks (high scoring risks should all have treatment plans).

Then select "Create snapshot" to create a new snapshot to act as a historical record of your most up-to-date review, and mark "share with auditors."
